asset.title: Startup Diligence Live Join
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates a multi-user live join flow for a startup diligence room, showing room creation, code sharing, and real-time collaboration.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows Maya creating a room, copying the code, and Priya joining using that code.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the complete flow from room creation to multi-user collaboration.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode UI, though some panels are text-dense.

consistency.evidence: Includes the room binder, research tab, room trace, and copilot chat.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Real browser interaction with actual UI elements and state updates.

legibility.evidence: Most text is readable, though sidebar items and room trace are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for collaborative financial analysis and startup diligence.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the real-time joining process and UI state changes.

defects.observed: The room code is slightly small and hard to read quickly.
defects.fix: Increase the font size or contrast of the shareable room code badge.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: See how multiple team members can instantly join a shared startup diligence room using a unique room code to collaborate with agents in real-time.
